nasb.text: Behold, your eyes see, and the eyes of my brother Benjamin see, that it is my mouth which is speaking to you.

esv.text: And now your eyes see, and the eyes of my brother Benjamin see, that it is my mouth that speaks to you.

cnv.text: 看哪，你們和我弟弟便雅憫都親眼看見，是我親口對你們說話。

ccb.text: 你们和我弟弟便雅悯都看见了，这是我亲口对你们说的。

csbs.text: 看哪，你们的眼睛和我弟弟本雅明的眼睛都看见了，是我在亲口对你们说话。
